name: Alchemic Magician
effectText:
3 Level 4 Spellcaster monsters
This card gains 200 ATK for each Spell in your GY. Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card and send 1 card from your hand to the GY; choose 1 Spell from your Deck, then Set it in your Spell & Trap Zone.
